title: Plan does not implement the cross-feature boundary called out in the spec
body: Spec moved notification toggles to user-settings, but the plan still wires them into this feature's settings page; the cross-feature boundary is not respected.

title: Email batching budget unrealistic for projected user base
body: Plan budgets 3 emails per user per day at peak; with the projected 200k user base that's 600k emails/day, exceeding the current ESP plan tier without an upgrade path documented.
